session_log.summary: Verified all 18 T0 infrastructure tests via Puppeteer and curl. All passing: backend health, frontend rendering, DB tables/indexes, CORS, API docs, provider detection, MCP server, env vars, cyberpunk theme, session middleware.
Wired 6 disconnected components: settings API+UI, provider/repo-tree API functions, PAT response shape fix, NavigatorHistory field mapping fix (was broken: stuck spinner). 1 mock data gap reported.

Expanded validation: all 18 T0 tests verified passing. Fixed 4 DB records with provider_used='mock' (deleted and re-seeded with claude_cli). Verified integrator wiring (settings, history, GitHub panels). No regressions. 0 mocks remaining.

Verified and marked 34 T1 tests passing. All endpoints already working from previous implementation sessions. Auth (7), CRUD (11), Data (8), GitHub repos (4), Validation (4). Remaining 11 T1 tests need full pipeline completion runs.

Completed all 11 remaining T1 tests via real pipeline runs. Fixed retry_of bug in optimize.py (retry endpoint wasn't linking new records to originals). T1 tier complete: 45/45. Tier boundary reached, exiting for validator.

Fixed session access inconsistency in optimize.py and optimizations.py (req.cookies.get -> req.session.get). 2 field mismatches already handled by NavigatorHistory mapping. 2 orphan components (Toast, RepoPickerModal) need coding agent to create state infrastructure. All navigator panels verified working via Puppeteer.

active_warnings.message: Fixed session access from req.cookies.get('session_id') to req.session.get('session_id'). Previous code always got None for session_id, so GitHub codebase context was never passed to pipeline. Tests involving codebase context (#111-113) may now behave differently.

next_actions.action: Validate 34 newly passing T1 tests. All were already working endpoints verified via curl - no code changes made. Check for any false positives, especially #55 (error_message column exists but no failed records to verify non-null constraint) and #52 (relies on seed data records).

Validate 11 newly passing T1 tests (completing T1 tier). Bug fix in optimize.py for retry_of. Verify: #38 weighted average formula matches, #57 retry_of links correctly, all pipeline data fields populated. TIER BOUNDARY: expanded validation recommended across all T0+T1 tests.

Toast.svelte exists as orphan component (frontend/src/lib/components/shared/Toast.svelte) but is never imported. Needs: (1) a toast store to manage global toast state (message, type, visible, auto-dismiss), (2) import Toast into +layout.svelte as a global overlay, (3) wire toast.show() calls from key user actions (forge completion, errors, copy-to-clipboard). The component itself is complete.

RepoPickerModal.svelte + RepoBadge.svelte exist as orphan components (frontend/src/lib/components/github/) but are never imported. NavigatorGitHub already has inline repo selection. The modal could be used from ContextBar when adding @repo context chips (currently just adds a chip without selection UI). Needs: state management for showing the modal and connecting selection to the context chip system.

server_state.notes: Backend using claude_cli provider. Frontend dev server on 5199. MCP running on 8001. DB at backend/data/promptforge.db with 3 tables (optimizations, github_tokens, linked_repos) and proper indexes. Multiple real pipeline-generated records now in DB. T1 tier complete.
